rulings.Case Title: SA CHALLENGER, INC., A MINNESOTA CORPORATION VS. DOUGLAS MOODY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Renewed Motion To Compel Arb And Stay Complt
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 15, 2013, line 1. PLAINTIFF SA CHALLENGER, INC., A MINNESOTA CORPORATION's Renewed Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Complaint. Grant motion to compel arbitration. Request to bifurcate/sever cross-complaint denied. Prevailing party to prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAYMON GHAFOURI et al VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., A BUSINESS ENTITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 15, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Grant striking portions of complaint. Opposition concedes breach of Implied Covenant contract based. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAYMON GHAFOURI et al VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., A BUSINESS ENTITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 15, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend as to cause of action 1 - Breach of Fiduciary duty to allege; cause of action 2 - Quiet Title to allege tender. Overrule as to cause of action 3 - Implied Covenant - 1) Filed within statute of limitations, 2) Grounds for demurrer for contract based breach of Implied Covenant not addressed in papers. = (501/REQ)
